title: RESTORE - 211info
text: COLUMBIA COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donation pickups available. Volunteer opportunities available. 164 Little Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 366-1400 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 366-1400 ext 1 Donations (971) 472-1688 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by item; cash and credit cards accepted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
